commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Carcasses. Literally, "ruins. "(Haydock)
The remains of the dead were probably not disturbed; but no more, that we know of, were placed on Sion. (Calmet)
Kings may signify idols, Moloc, which they had worshipped, and which some had even placed in the holy place, to the nation's ruin. (Haydock)
